## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [contribution guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] The resource is relevant to AMD ROCm, Instinct GPUs, or HPC/AI on AMD hardware
- [ ] I have placed the resource in the appropriate section
- [ ] I have used the correct format: `* **[Name](URL)** - Description.`
- [ ] The description is concise (1-2 sentences) and explains what the resource provides
- [ ] The link is working and points to the correct destination
- [ ] This is not a duplicate of an existing resource
